biological_replicate: Human articular cartilages from the intact knee joints were procured by tissue banks from 6 donors
technical_replicate: All immunoblottings were performed using n = 5 each group.
experimental_design: aging model vs surgically-induced OA model
we examined the knee joints of Cart-miR-23clus KO mice in two different mouse models of OA, an aging model as primary OA, and a surgical model as posttraumatic OA.
factor_value: Cart-miR-23clus KO mice and Control mice
